meaning: n.裂缝,裂口,断裂,长狭谷,不和
examples: A spokesman dismissed any suggestion of a boardroom rift.
The rift between them has not yet been completely healed.
At the northern extreme of the Rift Valley is Mount Hermon, which is the highest point. Mount Hermon is snow-covered.
Efforts to heal the rift and hold elections in both territories have repeatedly failed.
You also get 100, 000 rift crystals, the aforementioned eternal ferry stone, and the Gransys Armor pack.
